seoTitle: How to Integrate a Power Dialer With GoHighLevel
metaDescription: See how connecting a power dialer to GoHighLevel helps sales teams work through call lists faster while keeping every call logged in the CRM.
intro: Manually dialing through a list of leads eats up time that could be spent actually talking to prospects. This guide covers how to integrate a power dialer with GoHighLevel so your team can move through call lists faster while keeping everything logged in one place.

steps.heading: Choose a compatible power dialer
steps.body: Confirm the power dialer you plan to use supports integration with GoHighLevel, since compatibility varies by provider.

steps.heading: Connect the dialer to your GoHighLevel account
steps.body: Follow the integration steps to link the dialer to GoHighLevel, typically through API credentials or a built-in connector.

steps.heading: Sync your contact lists
steps.body: Pull the contacts you want to call into the dialer from your GoHighLevel pipeline or contact list, so your reps are working from up-to-date data.

steps.heading: Set up call logging
steps.body: Configure the integration so call outcomes and notes get logged back into GoHighLevel automatically, keeping your CRM records accurate.

steps.heading: Test the workflow with your team
steps.body: Run a few test calls to confirm contacts sync correctly and outcomes log back into GoHighLevel before rolling it out fully.

faq.question: Why use a power dialer instead of dialing manually?
faq.answer: A power dialer lets reps move through a call list much faster since it automatically queues the next call, cutting down on idle time between calls.

faq.question: Do call outcomes automatically update GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: Once properly integrated, call outcomes and notes should sync back into GoHighLevel, though this depends on how the specific dialer's integration is configured.

faq.question: Is a power dialer only useful for cold calling?
faq.answer: No, it's also useful for follow-up calls, appointment confirmations, and any scenario where a team needs to work through a large contact list efficiently.

faq.question: What should I check if calls aren't logging correctly?
faq.answer: Verify the sync settings between your dialer and GoHighLevel, since a misconfigured connection is the most common reason calls fail to log.
